name: Huarong International Financial Holdings Limited
summary: Huarong International Financial Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides financial services in Hong Kong and the People's Republic of China. The company operates through Securities, Corporate Finance, and Asset Management and Direct Investment segments. The Securities segment engages in the broking and dealing of securities, futures, and options contracts; and provision of margin financing services. The Corporate Finance segment offers securities underwriting and sponsoring, and financial advisory services to institutional clients. The Asset Management and Direct Investment segment provides asset management services; and makes direct investments in equities, bonds, funds, derivative instruments, and other financial products. Huarong International Financial Holdings Limited also offers sub-leasing arrangement, money lending, and consultancy services. The company was formerly known as Simsen International Corporation Limited and changed its name to Huarong International Financial Holdings Limited in October 2015. The company is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong. Huarong International Financial Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Camellia Pacific Investment Holding Limited.
